title: Eva unit 00s soul
wikitext:
[]: Eva- unit 00's soul Post by Shinji-kun » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:34 pm Apparently this has still been left unsolved. Who's soul is in the core of unit 00. I think it is Naoko Akagi. The main reason i say this is, in episode 14 when unit 00 went berserk it tried to arrack Gendo through the glass. Perhaps she was still mad that gend told Rei she was a hag?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:44 pm Try one of these threads. http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=70 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=488 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=1179

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Aug 02, 2009 1:46 pm Read this before you go any further: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Theory_and_Analysis:Eva-00%27s_Soul Also, this has been discussed to death time and time again. Nothing new or interesting will come from bringing this up again aside from more silly Naoko musings.
